dict.string: Orbit needs to send Apple events to control other applications for computer automation tasks.
Orbit needs administrative access to perform computer control tasks like clicking and typing.
Orbit needs accessibility access to control your computer. This enables features like automated clicking, typing, and interacting with applications on your behalf.
Orbit needs to capture your screen to analyze what's displayed and provide intelligent computer control assistance.
Orbit may need camera access for advanced AI features.
Orbit needs microphone access for voice commands and audio processing.
